commands.command: First-class health supervisor mechanical candidate audit
commands.summary: 1044 questions scanned; 58 candidate sets and 222 boundaries had deterministic IDs, ordered in-range spans, and non-empty exact source slices

goalbuddy_receipt_v1.summary: 資格共通の列挙境界検出からsourceHash依存のboundary/candidate IDを生成し、レビュー出力をclassification、candidateId、decision、issueCodesだけへ変更した。本文、要約、正誤回答、raw offset、未知fieldは拒否する。二者完全ID一致後だけserverがspanへ解決して原文をsliceする。checkpointのbatch取得、予約、確定、consensusは同じlock内の単一load/write/readbackへ集約し、検証失敗時の無変更もテストした。
deviations: Dedicated Worker left no allowed-file evidence within the GoalBuddy timeout; PM fallback completed the same bounded task without widening scope.
remaining_blockers: T045 Judge approval for a fresh candidate-ID canary
Downstream correctness, explanation, question set, publish gate, and Firestore readback
